pr.title: Non-record: state-space hybrid with attention anchors

output.summary: Front-load attention with layout AAAAAAASS and targeted fp16 export for state-space tensors to keep a compile-friendly hybrid on a single-shard Blackwell continuation.
techniques: Hybrid SSM-attention stack (AAAAAAASS) with short SSM tail
Float16 export limited to ssm_coeff/log_decay/ssm_d to cut bytes
Scorer-path Blackwell continuation matched by wallclock on one shard
